title: Elsota retusa
intro:

Elsinée retusa is a plant species that is known for its medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, thanks to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The bioactive constituents of Elsinée retusa include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal effects. Elsinée retusa is often used to make herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being incorporated into traditional medicine remedies.
